title: Elemental Stones
description: Datapack that adds elemental staff and 4 elemental stones each of them have unique power
body:
Datapack for version 1.21.5 that adds elemental staff AND 4 elemental stones. 

You need both elemental staff and at least 1 elemental stone.

When you hold elemental staff in your main hand and elemental stone in your off hand by pressing

Q
F
Right click
Hold Shift + right click

You can use staff abilities releated to elemental stone.

For example when you hold fire stone in your off hand and elemental staff in your main hand
by pressing right click you will shoot small fireball.

Have fun!
